fresh_user_hero_path: Playwright fresh context opens /, clicks Try as Guest, reveals first consume and replay rejection on /try, then opens /capsules. See tests/onboard.spec.ts.
public_access: Guest mode is enabled with no login wall before value. The current B6 app is a public evidence workbench over seeded OpenClaw and Pharos reports; fresh chain writes remain CLI/local until the restricted relayer ships.
reset_or_seed_strategy: Seeded evidence is safe to share under public/evidence and demo/*.json. Guest-owned capsule records are isolated in localStorage by guestSessionId/ownerId and can be cleared from /capsules without deleting seeded evidence.
abuse_limits: The browser workbench does not expose the private relayer key or arbitrary contract writes. Local history is capped at 12 records. Fresh Pharos writes require local CLI env secrets until a rate-limited relayer is added.
support_contact_or_failure_state: UI keeps typed honesty boundaries: local-demo capsules are labeled local, Pharos proof reports link to explorer receipts, and verifier errors point to schema/hash/replay fields instead of showing fake success.
current_limits: D1/SQLite deployment storage is planned but not implemented in B6.
Public relayer is intentionally not exposed until rate limits and target-contract allowlist are implemented.
eth_getProof depth is still a proof-panel milestone; current live proof is receipt plus ReplayFenceReplay revert evidence.
